patches.content:
Index: 
===================================================================
--- 
+++ 
@@ -96,9 +96,9 @@
     engine.loadPlugin(LemegetonPlugin);
     
     // 4-paragraph intro
     engine.printLine(
-      ""
+      "" +
       "In Eden, King Solomonis of the Kingdom of Clavicula forces humans and spirits alike to attend the annual battle of Apotheosis Armageddon—a battle where the main trophy is becoming a God, achieving the Zenith Rank. Every night, many demons lurk around Clavicula to steal souls, kill, and terrorize the townspeople. The Grand Creator remains silent, as faith on Earth and Eden dwindles under the rule of the dictator Lucifer.{{newline}}{{newline}}" +
                      "The story follows the twins, Deo and Dominique, who were separated as children when King Solomonis kidnapped Dominique to join his cult. After being hypnotized, Dominique wandered off into the woods, and Solomonis, mocking her mother’s screams, renamed the child Desdemona. While Deo stayed behind, Desdemona was manipulated and brainwashed by the cult, led to believe she was destined to become the anti-christ.{{newline}}{{newline}}" +
                      "Desdemona’s life in the cult was one of torture and spiritual death. Thrown into the basement of demons whenever she disobeyed, she was trapped in magical barriers until she broke, becoming masochistic and delusional. Brainwashed once more through magic to enforce submission, she now lives a life of loneliness and delusion, trapped in the cult’s hierarchy of magic and summoning.{{newline}}{{newline}}" +
                      "Now, you find yourself at the beginning of your journey in the atrium of knowledge. The path to godhood is before you, but the weight of forbidden knowledge is heavy. You must learn the basics of magic, sigils, and spirit summoning from the Lemegeton grimoire, all while maintaining your reputation as a biblical king—or perhaps, finding a way to break the chains that bind your soul.");
